author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone Episode #1 of CORE is now available on our Galactic Marketplace and Magic Eden!

Get your copy and start your quest today!

If you'd like to learn more about CORE, please head to https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel for more details.

Have questions? Check out the FAQs here ⁠No Access
